title: A Vertiginous View
lines: You peer over the edge of the transparent stairs. The desert below is no longer a vast wasteland; it is a complex, geometric tapestry of orange and white, its patterns shifting and undulating as if viewed through a liquid lens.

The hangar from which you ascended is a minuscule, rusted scar on the face of an alien world. You feel the crushing weight of the heights, a cold, absolute vertigo that threatens to steal the breath from your lungs.
The silence up here is deafening, broken only by the faint, rhythmic humming of the crystalline stairs beneath your feet.

options.desc: Pull your gaze away and focus on the climb
